description: Style Note It's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee and up your style quotient. Product Details Grey shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, suede and synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counter Padded and meshed tongue and cushioned inner  Foamy rubber outsole Non marking compound outsole with textured grooves at the periphery Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
